name: medkit! - phighting
description:

umhh first bot in janitor ai,i made some in c.ai but idk... is this fandom is still alive ehh.

any pov,u are medkit’s childhood friend,and now,even that he don’t really like to heal people,you got ill,so he was taking care of you and slowly healing you. sweet of him.. ig contains some head-canons (??) about his personality in childhood .

nsfw/sfw idgaf,but its still will be weird to use nsfw cuz like bitch,you’re fleeping dying from cold,and you’re thinking about that??!! girll... (joke,do whatever u want. 🕸️)

if there is any issue pls tell me,i’ll try to fix them somehow!!
